name: Irkutsk Public Joint Stock Company of Energetics and Electrification
summary: Irkutsk Public Joint Stock Company of Energetics and Electrification engages in the power generation activities in Russia. The company operates three hydraulic power plants and nine thermal power plants with an installed capacity of 12.9 thousand MW. It also operates electricity and heat transmission networks. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Irkutsk, Russia. Irkutsk Public Joint Stock Company of Energetics and Electrification is a subsidiary of EuroSibEnergo PLC.
